TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_sslalu’, title = sslalu’, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/sslalu’} }

S.FORM: sslalu' gaga' na sslalu' Tayal hya' ga, syun naha' glaing lalu' na laqi' hru 'buzyan naha' lalu' na yaba' naha' tay suruw, gi yasa qu blaq slpuw musa' tay yatux.
sslalu' gaga' na sslalu' Tayal hya' ga, syun naha' glaing lalu' na laqi' hru 'buzyan naha' lalu' na yaba' naha' tay suruw, gi yasa qu blaq slpuw musa' tay yatux.
S.PHON: s~ɕs~ɕlaluʔ ɣaɣaʔ na s~ɕs~ɕlaluʔ tajal ħjaʔ ɣa, s~ɕjun naħaʔ ɣlaiŋ laluʔ na laqiʔ ħru ʔβuzjan naħaʔ laluʔ na jaβaʔ naħaʔ taj s~ɕuruw, ɣi jas~ɕa qu βlaq s~ɕlpuw mus~ɕaʔ taj jatux.
